Document:
# The Chroma Sector
[color=yellow]The Chroma Sector[/color] is a sector of the Milky-Way Galaxy located a bit too close to Sagittarius A* for anyone's comfort. It's a highly valuable location for all of the companies interested in it, considering the fragility of the Noosphere within it, as well as a variety of valuable resources and knowledge.
Due to the Noospheric instability within the Chroma Sector, phenomena such as anomalies, weird dragons, crossovers between universes, and more occur a lot more frequency here. This has also led to the discovery of [bold][color=yellow]abberrant species[/color][/bold] and their experiences within the concurrent plane.
(The concurrent plane being the specific plane of the Versuis ChromaStation takes place within.)
[italic]More will be added to this later.[/italic]
